title: Is The Scientific Method OUTDATED?
summary: A discussion about the limitations of the scientific method when applied to non-repeatable phenomena like UAP encounters, arguing that Francis Bacon's foundational assumption of repeatability may not adequately address anomalous events like the Tic Tac incident.

key_claims.claim: The scientific method was invented by Francis Bacon
The scientific method assumes that phenomena must be repeatable and testable to be considered scientific
The assumption of repeatability presumes the universe is static
The Tic Tac encounter represents an anomaly that was not repeatable yet still requires scientific study
